title: rhynchosia cordata
intro: Rhynchosia cordata, also known as the heartleaf or greenhill pea, is a perennial climber belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rhynchosia cordata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various ailments such as rheumatism and bronchitis. Rhynchosia cordata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tonics and other preparations.
